Video.summary: Savor the rich and diverse flavors of Chinese cuisine in a world of taste.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Chinese Food in Korea

Video.summary: Immerse yourself in the rich and diverse world of Chinese cuisine where an abundance of flavors await.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Grilled & Casual Food

Video.summary: Sample various types of Korean jeon, from seafood green onion jeon to colorful skewers and mung bean jeon.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Jeon Festival

Video.summary: Delight in Durian Cream Cheese Tart, Strawberry Cream Cheese Tart, Cotton Candy Ice Cream, and Milk Shake.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Tarts and Sweets

Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Video.summary: Satisfy your sweet tooth with a diverse assortment of delectable cakes.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Cake Collection

Video.summary: Feast on cheese-filled fried meat, assorted Korean fries, and fried squid for crispy, flavorful snacks.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Fried Snacks

Video.summary: Experience the harmonious blend of Korean Chinese flavors for an extraordinary dining experience.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Korean Chinese Food Collection

Video.summary: Treat yourself to a variety of sweet Korean desserts each with its unique charm and taste.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Korean Dessert

Video.summary: Indulge in intense red tteokbokki, five-flavored sundae, and a selection of Jeju-style Korean snacks.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Tteokbokki and Sundae Special

Food Kingdom: Tteokbokki and Sundae Special

Video.summary: Experience an array of special grill courses with Tepanyaki cooking each a sizzling delight.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Special Grill Course (Tepanyaki)

Video.summary: Savor the rich and varied flavors of pork, from succulent pork ribs to melt-in-your-mouth jokbal.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Pork Dishes in Korea

Video.summary: Enjoy a delicious snack combo of tteokbokki, gimbap, and fishcake from Korea’s famous eateries and markets.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Snack Combo

Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Street Food

Video.title: FoodieBoy : Amazing Special Cake

Video.summary: Treat yourself to an indulgent sushi feast with a wide variety of options that cater to your sushi cravings.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Sushi in Korea

Video.summary: Taste flower crepes, frozen Dubai tarts, and crispy rice chocolate for a colorful fusion dessert experience.

Video.title: FoodieBoy : Meat Cuisine
